title: National Register of Historic Places listings in Yellowstone National Park
rows: Mammoth Hot Springs and Norris , Wyoming ; Gardiner , Montana , near Buffalo Lake , Idaho 44°58′30″N 110°41′53″W / 44.975°N 110.698056°W / 44.975 ; -110.698056 ( Fort Yellowstone )

description: This table lists sites within Yellowstone National Park that are included in the National Register of Historic Places. It provides details about each site's name, date of listing, location, associated city or town, and a brief description of its significance or purpose.
